  Refactor 0: "Convert to Effect.fn(\"sampleReturns\")" (refactor.rewrite.effect.effectGenToFn)
  Refactor 1: "Toggle return type annotation" (refactor.rewrite.effect.toggleReturnTypeAnnotation)

  Refactor 0: "Toggle type annotation" (refactor.rewrite.effect.toggleTypeAnnotation)
  Refactor 1: "Toggle lazy const" (refactor.rewrite.effect.toggleLazyConst)

[R6] selection: "12:21-12:21"
  Refactor 0: "Toggle type annotation" (refactor.rewrite.effect.toggleTypeAnnotation)
  Refactor 1: "Toggle lazy const" (refactor.rewrite.effect.toggleLazyConst)

[R7] selection: "empty (0:0-0:0)"
  (no refactors)

=== Refactor Application Results ===

=== [R1] Refactor 0: "Convert to Effect.fn(\"program\")" ===

--- file:///.src/effectGenToFn.ts ---
// refactor: 6:8, 13:8, 22:16, 30:8, 5:17, 12:21
// @effect-v3
import * as Eff from "effect/Effect"

export const program = Eff.fn("program")(function* () {
    const a = yield* Eff.succeed(1);
    const b = yield* Eff.succeed(2);
    return a + b;
});

export const programWithPipes = (fa: number, fb: number) =>
  Eff.gen(function*() {
    const a = yield* Eff.succeed(fa)
    const b = yield* Eff.succeed(fb)
    return a + b
  }).pipe(
    Eff.map((a) => a + 1)
  )

export function sampleReturns<A extends number, B extends number>(arg1: A, arg2: B) {
  return Eff.gen(function*() {
    const a = yield* Eff.succeed(arg1)
    const b = yield* Eff.succeed(arg2)
    return a + b
  })
}

export const sampleReturnsConciseBody = <A extends number, B extends number>(arg1: A, arg2: B) =>
  Eff.gen(function*() {
    const a = yield* Eff.succeed(arg1)
    const b = yield* Eff.succeed(arg2)
    return a + b
  })


=== [R1] Refactor 1: "Toggle return type annotation" ===

--- file:///.src/effectGenToFn.ts ---
// refactor: 6:8, 13:8, 22:16, 30:8, 5:17, 12:21
// @effect-v3
import * as Eff from "effect/Effect"

export const program = (): Eff.Effect<number, never, never> =>
  Eff.gen(function*() {
    const a = yield* Eff.succeed(1)
    const b = yield* Eff.succeed(2)
    return a + b
  })

export const programWithPipes = (fa: number, fb: number) =>
  Eff.gen(function*() {
    const a = yield* Eff.succeed(fa)
    const b = yield* Eff.succeed(fb)
    return a + b
  }).pipe(
    Eff.map((a) => a + 1)
  )

export function sampleReturns<A extends number, B extends number>(arg1: A, arg2: B) {
  return Eff.gen(function*() {
    const a = yield* Eff.succeed(arg1)
    const b = yield* Eff.succeed(arg2)
    return a + b
  })
}

export const sampleReturnsConciseBody = <A extends number, B extends number>(arg1: A, arg2: B) =>
  Eff.gen(function*() {
    const a = yield* Eff.succeed(arg1)
    const b = yield* Eff.succeed(arg2)
    return a + b
  })


=== [R2] Refactor 0: "Rewrite as pipe(X, Y, Z, ...)" ===

--- file:///.src/effectGenToFn.ts ---
// refactor: 6:8, 13:8, 22:16, 30:8, 5:17, 12:21
// @effect-v3
import * as Eff from "effect/Effect"

export const program = () =>
  Eff.gen(function*() {
    const a = yield* Eff.succeed(1)
    const b = yield* Eff.succeed(2)
    return a + b
  })

export const programWithPipes = (fa: number, fb: number) =>
  pipe(Eff.gen(function*() {
    const a = yield* Eff.succeed(fa)
    const b = yield* Eff.succeed(fb)
    return a + b
  }), Eff.map((a) => a + 1))

export function sampleReturns<A extends number, B extends number>(arg1: A, arg2: B) {
  return Eff.gen(function*() {
    const a = yield* Eff.succeed(arg1)
    const b = yield* Eff.succeed(arg2)
    return a + b
  })
}

export const sampleReturnsConciseBody = <A extends number, B extends number>(arg1: A, arg2: B) =>
  Eff.gen(function*() {
    const a = yield* Eff.succeed(arg1)
    const b = yield* Eff.succeed(arg2)
    return a + b
  })


=== [R2] Refactor 1: "Wrap with Effect.gen" ===

--- file:///.src/effectGenToFn.ts ---
// refactor: 6:8, 13:8, 22:16, 30:8, 5:17, 12:21
// @effect-v3
import * as Eff from "effect/Effect"

export const program = () =>
  Eff.gen(function*() {
    const a = yield* Eff.succeed(1)
    const b = yield* Eff.succeed(2)
    return a + b
  })

export const programWithPipes = (fa: number, fb: number) =>
  Eff.gen(function*() { return yield* Eff.gen(function*() {
    const a = yield* Eff.succeed(fa)
    const b = yield* Eff.succeed(fb)
    return a + b
  }).pipe(
    Eff.map((a) => a + 1)
  ) })

export function sampleReturns<A extends number, B extends number>(arg1: A, arg2: B) {
  return Eff.gen(function*() {
    const a = yield* Eff.succeed(arg1)
    const b = yield* Eff.succeed(arg2)
    return a + b
  })
}

export const sampleReturnsConciseBody = <A extends number, B extends number>(arg1: A, arg2: B) =>
  Eff.gen(function*() {
    const a = yield* Eff.succeed(arg1)
    const b = yield* Eff.succeed(arg2)
    return a + b
  })


=== [R2] Refactor 2: "Convert to Effect.fn(\"programWithPipes\")" ===

--- file:///.src/effectGenToFn.ts ---
// refactor: 6:8, 13:8, 22:16, 30:8, 5:17, 12:21
// @effect-v3
import * as Eff from "effect/Effect"

export const program = () =>
  Eff.gen(function*() {
    const a = yield* Eff.succeed(1)
    const b = yield* Eff.succeed(2)
    return a + b
  })

export const programWithPipes = Eff.fn("programWithPipes")(function* (fa: number, fb: number) {
    const a = yield* Eff.succeed(fa);
    const b = yield* Eff.succeed(fb);
    return a + b;
}, Eff.map(a => a + 1));

export function sampleReturns<A extends number, B extends number>(arg1: A, arg2: B) {
  return Eff.gen(function*() {
    const a = yield* Eff.succeed(arg1)
    const b = yield* Eff.succeed(arg2)
    return a + b
  })
}

export const sampleReturnsConciseBody = <A extends number, B extends number>(arg1: A, arg2: B) =>
  Eff.gen(function*() {
    const a = yield* Eff.succeed(arg1)
    const b = yield* Eff.succeed(arg2)
    return a + b
  })


=== [R2] Refactor 3: "Toggle return type annotation" ===

--- file:///.src/effectGenToFn.ts ---
// refactor: 6:8, 13:8, 22:16, 30:8, 5:17, 12:21
// @effect-v3
import * as Eff from "effect/Effect"

export const program = () =>
  Eff.gen(function*() {
    const a = yield* Eff.succeed(1)
    const b = yield* Eff.succeed(2)
    return a + b
  })

export const programWithPipes = (fa: number, fb: number): Eff.Effect<number, never, never> =>
  Eff.gen(function*() {
    const a = yield* Eff.succeed(fa)
    const b = yield* Eff.succeed(fb)
    return a + b
  }).pipe(
    Eff.map((a) => a + 1)
  )

export function sampleReturns<A extends number, B extends number>(arg1: A, arg2: B) {
  return Eff.gen(function*() {
    const a = yield* Eff.succeed(arg1)
    const b = yield* Eff.succeed(arg2)
    return a + b
  })
}

export const sampleReturnsConciseBody = <A extends number, B extends number>(arg1: A, arg2: B) =>
  Eff.gen(function*() {
    const a = yield* Eff.succeed(arg1)
    const b = yield* Eff.succeed(arg2)
    return a + b
  })


=== [R3] Refactor 0: "Convert to Effect.fn(\"sampleReturns\")" ===

--- file:///.src/effectGenToFn.ts ---
// refactor: 6:8, 13:8, 22:16, 30:8, 5:17, 12:21
// @effect-v3
import * as Eff from "effect/Effect"

export const program = () =>
  Eff.gen(function*() {
    const a = yield* Eff.succeed(1)
    const b = yield* Eff.succeed(2)
    return a + b
  })

export const programWithPipes = (fa: number, fb: number) =>
  Eff.gen(function*() {
    const a = yield* Eff.succeed(fa)
    const b = yield* Eff.succeed(fb)
    return a + b
  }).pipe(
    Eff.map((a) => a + 1)
  )

export const sampleReturns = Eff.fn("sampleReturns")(function* <A extends number, B extends number>(arg1: A, arg2: B) {
    const a = yield* Eff.succeed(arg1);
    const b = yield* Eff.succeed(arg2);
    return a + b;
});

export const sampleReturnsConciseBody = <A extends number, B extends number>(arg1: A, arg2: B) =>
  Eff.gen(function*() {
    const a = yield* Eff.succeed(arg1)
    const b = yield* Eff.succeed(arg2)
    return a + b
  })


=== [R3] Refactor 1: "Toggle return type annotation" ===

--- file:///.src/effectGenToFn.ts ---
// refactor: 6:8, 13:8, 22:16, 30:8, 5:17, 12:21
// @effect-v3
import * as Eff from "effect/Effect"

export const program = () =>
  Eff.gen(function*() {
    const a = yield* Eff.succeed(1)
    const b = yield* Eff.succeed(2)
    return a + b
  })

export const programWithPipes = (fa: number, fb: number) =>
  Eff.gen(function*() {
    const a = yield* Eff.succeed(fa)
    const b = yield* Eff.succeed(fb)
    return a + b
  }).pipe(
    Eff.map((a) => a + 1)
  )

export function sampleReturns<A extends number, B extends number>(arg1: A, arg2: B): Eff.Effect<number, never, never> {
  return Eff.gen(function*() {
    const a = yield* Eff.succeed(arg1)
    const b = yield* Eff.succeed(arg2)
    return a + b
  })
}

export const sampleReturnsConciseBody = <A extends number, B extends number>(arg1: A, arg2: B) =>
  Eff.gen(function*() {
    const a = yield* Eff.succeed(arg1)
    const b = yield* Eff.succeed(arg2)
    return a + b
  })


=== [R4] Refactor 0: "Convert to Effect.fn(\"sampleReturnsConciseBody\")" ===

--- file:///.src/effectGenToFn.ts ---
// refactor: 6:8, 13:8, 22:16, 30:8, 5:17, 12:21
// @effect-v3
import * as Eff from "effect/Effect"

export const program = () =>
  Eff.gen(function*() {
    const a = yield* Eff.succeed(1)
    const b = yield* Eff.succeed(2)
    return a + b
  })

export const programWithPipes = (fa: number, fb: number) =>
  Eff.gen(function*() {
    const a = yield* Eff.succeed(fa)
    const b = yield* Eff.succeed(fb)
    return a + b
  }).pipe(
    Eff.map((a) => a + 1)
  )

export function sampleReturns<A extends number, B extends number>(arg1: A, arg2: B) {
  return Eff.gen(function*() {
    const a = yield* Eff.succeed(arg1)
    const b = yield* Eff.succeed(arg2)
    return a + b
  })
}

export const sampleReturnsConciseBody = Eff.fn("sampleReturnsConciseBody")(function* <A extends number, B extends number>(arg1: A, arg2: B) {
    const a = yield* Eff.succeed(arg1);
    const b = yield* Eff.succeed(arg2);
    return a + b;
});


=== [R4] Refactor 1: "Toggle return type annotation" ===

--- file:///.src/effectGenToFn.ts ---
// refactor: 6:8, 13:8, 22:16, 30:8, 5:17, 12:21
// @effect-v3
import * as Eff from "effect/Effect"

export const program = () =>
  Eff.gen(function*() {
    const a = yield* Eff.succeed(1)
    const b = yield* Eff.succeed(2)
    return a + b
  })

export const programWithPipes = (fa: number, fb: number) =>
  Eff.gen(function*() {
    const a = yield* Eff.succeed(fa)
    const b = yield* Eff.succeed(fb)
    return a + b
  }).pipe(
    Eff.map((a) => a + 1)
  )

export function sampleReturns<A extends number, B extends number>(arg1: A, arg2: B) {
  return Eff.gen(function*() {
    const a = yield* Eff.succeed(arg1)
    const b = yield* Eff.succeed(arg2)
    return a + b
  })
}

export const sampleReturnsConciseBody = <A extends number, B extends number>(arg1: A, arg2: B): Eff.Effect<number, never, never> =>
  Eff.gen(function*() {
    const a = yield* Eff.succeed(arg1)
    const b = yield* Eff.succeed(arg2)
    return a + b
  })


=== [R5] Refactor 0: "Toggle type annotation" ===

--- file:///.src/effectGenToFn.ts ---
// refactor: 6:8, 13:8, 22:16, 30:8, 5:17, 12:21
// @effect-v3
import * as Eff from "effect/Effect"

export const program: () => Eff.Effect<number, never, never> = () =>
  Eff.gen(function*() {
    const a = yield* Eff.succeed(1)
    const b = yield* Eff.succeed(2)
    return a + b
  })

export const programWithPipes = (fa: number, fb: number) =>
  Eff.gen(function*() {
    const a = yield* Eff.succeed(fa)
    const b = yield* Eff.succeed(fb)
    return a + b
  }).pipe(
    Eff.map((a) => a + 1)
  )

export function sampleReturns<A extends number, B extends number>(arg1: A, arg2: B) {
  return Eff.gen(function*() {
    const a = yield* Eff.succeed(arg1)
    const b = yield* Eff.succeed(arg2)
    return a + b
  })
}

export const sampleReturnsConciseBody = <A extends number, B extends number>(arg1: A, arg2: B) =>
  Eff.gen(function*() {
    const a = yield* Eff.succeed(arg1)
    const b = yield* Eff.succeed(arg2)
    return a + b
  })


=== [R5] Refactor 1: "Toggle lazy const" ===

--- file:///.src/effectGenToFn.ts ---
// refactor: 6:8, 13:8, 22:16, 30:8, 5:17, 12:21
// @effect-v3
import * as Eff from "effect/Effect"

export const program =
  Eff.gen(function*() {
    const a = yield* Eff.succeed(1)
    const b = yield* Eff.succeed(2)
    return a + b
  })

export const programWithPipes = (fa: number, fb: number) =>
  Eff.gen(function*() {
    const a = yield* Eff.succeed(fa)
    const b = yield* Eff.succeed(fb)
    return a + b
  }).pipe(
    Eff.map((a) => a + 1)
  )

export function sampleReturns<A extends number, B extends number>(arg1: A, arg2: B) {
  return Eff.gen(function*() {
    const a = yield* Eff.succeed(arg1)
    const b = yield* Eff.succeed(arg2)
    return a + b
  })
}

export const sampleReturnsConciseBody = <A extends number, B extends number>(arg1: A, arg2: B) =>
  Eff.gen(function*() {
    const a = yield* Eff.succeed(arg1)
    const b = yield* Eff.succeed(arg2)
    return a + b
  })


=== [R6] Refactor 0: "Toggle type annotation" ===

--- file:///.src/effectGenToFn.ts ---
// refactor: 6:8, 13:8, 22:16, 30:8, 5:17, 12:21
// @effect-v3
import * as Eff from "effect/Effect"

export const program = () =>
  Eff.gen(function*() {
    const a = yield* Eff.succeed(1)
    const b = yield* Eff.succeed(2)
    return a + b
  })

export const programWithPipes: (fa: number, fb: number) => Eff.Effect<number, never, never> = (fa: number, fb: number) =>
  Eff.gen(function*() {
    const a = yield* Eff.succeed(fa)
    const b = yield* Eff.succeed(fb)
    return a + b
  }).pipe(
    Eff.map((a) => a + 1)
  )

export function sampleReturns<A extends number, B extends number>(arg1: A, arg2: B) {
  return Eff.gen(function*() {
    const a = yield* Eff.succeed(arg1)
    const b = yield* Eff.succeed(arg2)
    return a + b
  })
}

export const sampleReturnsConciseBody = <A extends number, B extends number>(arg1: A, arg2: B) =>
  Eff.gen(function*() {
    const a = yield* Eff.succeed(arg1)
    const b = yield* Eff.succeed(arg2)
    return a + b
  })


=== [R6] Refactor 1: "Toggle lazy const" ===

--- file:///.src/effectGenToFn.ts ---
// refactor: 6:8, 13:8, 22:16, 30:8, 5:17, 12:21
// @effect-v3
import * as Eff from "effect/Effect"

export const program = () =>
  Eff.gen(function*() {
    const a = yield* Eff.succeed(1)
    const b = yield* Eff.succeed(2)
    return a + b
  })

export const programWithPipes = () => (fa: number, fb: number) =>
  Eff.gen(function*() {
    const a = yield* Eff.succeed(fa)
    const b = yield* Eff.succeed(fb)
    return a + b
  }).pipe(
    Eff.map((a) => a + 1)
  )

export function sampleReturns<A extends number, B extends number>(arg1: A, arg2: B) {
  return Eff.gen(function*() {
    const a = yield* Eff.succeed(arg1)
    const b = yield* Eff.succeed(arg2)
    return a + b
  })
}

export const sampleReturnsConciseBody = <A extends number, B extends number>(arg1: A, arg2: B) =>
  Eff.gen(function*() {
    const a = yield* Eff.succeed(arg1)
    const b = yield* Eff.succeed(arg2)
    return a + b
  })
